basic_details.job_title: Gauhati High Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chauffeur and Multi Tasking Staff Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gauhati High Court Chauffeur (Driver) and Multi Tasking Staff Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Gauhati High Court. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Gauhati High Court Chauffeur (Driver) and Multi Tasking Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: OBC/MOBC: 43 years SC/ST: 45 years PwBD: 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: Class X (HSLC) from recognized Board and valid LMV driving license (Chauffeur), Class VIII standard (MTS); HSSLC or above ineligible
qualification.details: Chauffeur: Class X (HSLC) standard from a recognized Board and valid LMV driving license issued by competent authority. Multi Tasking Staff: Class-VIII (8th) standard; candidates who have passed HSSLC (12th) or above shall be ineligible.

salary_details.details: Chauffeur: PB-2 Rs.14000-70000/- with Grade Pay Rs.5200/- plus allowances as admissible. Multi Tasking Staff: PB-1 Rs.12000-52000/- with Grade Pay Rs.3900/- plus allowances as admissible.

selection_process: Screening test/Written Examination (OMR based) Driving test (Chauffeur) Interview/Viva-Voce Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gauhati High Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gauhati High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Gauhati High Court Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Gauhati High Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Chauffeur: Class X (HSLC) standard from a recognized Board and valid LMV driving license issued by competent authority. Multi Tasking Staff: Class-VIII (8th) standard; candidates who have passed HSSLC (12th) or above shall be ineligible.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 40 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: OBC/MOBC: 43 years SC/ST: 45 years PwBD: 50 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Chauffeur: PB-2 Rs.14000-70000/- with Grade Pay Rs.5200/- plus allowances as admissible. Multi Tasking Staff: PB-1 Rs.12000-52000/- with Grade Pay Rs.3900/- plus allowances as admissible.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening test/Written Examination (OMR based) Driving test (Chauffeur) Interview/Viva-Voce Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gauhati High Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gauhati High Court to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What posts are available in the Gauhati High Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Gauhati High Court is recruiting for the posts of Chauffeur (Driver) and Multi Tasking Staff. There are a total of 2 vacancies available for these positions.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application form for the Chauffeur and Multi Tasking Staff posts is 30 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for Gauhati High Court vacancies?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Gauhati High Court Chauffeur and Multi Tasking Staff recruitment is online. Interested and eligible candidates must submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 40 years. Age relaxation is provided for OBC/MOBC (43 years), SC/ST (45 years), and PwBD (50 years) categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Chauffeur post?
faq.answer: For the Chauffeur position, candidates must have passed Class X (HSLC) from a recognized Board and possess a valid LMV driving license issued by a competent authority.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification for the Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) post?
faq.answer: Candidates for the Multi Tasking Staff post must have passed Class-VIII (8th) standard. Importantly, candidates who have passed HSSLC (12th) or above are ineligible for this specific position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: General/OBC category candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 500/-. SC/ST candidates pay Rs. 250/-, while PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Chauffeur post?
faq.answer: The Chauffeur post offers a salary in Pay Band-2, ranging from Rs.14000-70000/- with a Grade Pay of Rs.5200/-, plus other admissible allowances as per rules.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these Gauhati High Court posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Screening test/Written Examination (OMR based), a Driving test (for Chauffeur), an Interview/Viva-Voce, and Document Verification to assess candidates' suitability.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the direct link to apply online in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is crucial to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
